title: calorophus lateriflorus
intro: Calorophus lateriflorus, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or coral honeysuckle, is a flowering vine native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Calorophus lateriflorus include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
